ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_systems" (
  "pwsid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the public water system */,
  "pwsname" TEXT /* Name of the public water system */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the public water system (e.g., L for large) */,
  "facilitywatertype" TEXT /* Type of water facility (e.g., GW for groundwater) */,
  "region" INTEGER /* Region where the water system is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the water system is located */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Number of people served by the public water system */,
  "water_source_type" TEXT /* Type of water source (e.g., surface water, groundwater) */,
  "treatment_process" TEXT /* Treatment process used by the water system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pwsid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_systems_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_systems_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sampleid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the water sample */,
  "pwsid" TEXT /* ID of the public water system where the sample was collected */,
  "collectiondate" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sampleeventcode" TEXT /* Code for the sample event (e.g., SE1, SE2) */,
  "monitoringrequirement" TEXT /* Type of monitoring requirement (e.g., AM for annual monitoring) */,
  "contaminant" TEXT /* Name of the contaminant being analyzed */,
  "mrl" REAL /* Minimum reporting level for the contaminant */,
  "methodid" TEXT /* ID of the method used for analysis */,
  "analyticalresultssign" TEXT /* Sign for the analytical result (e.g., <, >) */,
  "analyticalresultvalue" REAL /* Value of the analytical result */,
  "sample_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the sample (e.g., water, soil) */,
  "sample_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "sampling_device" TEXT /* Device used for sampling */,
  "sample_storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample was stored before analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was analyzed */,
  "analysis_result_status" TEXT /* Status of the analytical result (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "result_comment" TEXT /* Comments related to the analytical result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sampleid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_contaminant FOREIGN KEY ("contaminant") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_pwsid FOREIGN KEY ("pwsid") REFERENCES water_systems ("pwsid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_methodid FOREIGN KEY ("methodid") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each region */,
  "region_manager" TEXT /* Name of the regional manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the state is located */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "contaminants" (
  "contaminant_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each contaminant */,
  "contaminant_name" TEXT /* Name of the contaminant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contaminant */,
  "contaminant_category" TEXT /* Category of the contaminant (e.g., organic, inorganic) */,
  "contaminant_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the contaminant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contaminant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* Type of analytical method (e.g., chromatography, spectroscopy) */,
  "method_accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the method (e.g., EPA-approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "sampleid" TEXT /* ID of the water sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sampleid FOREIGN KEY ("sampleid") REFERENCES samples ("sampleid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
